creator: inge@home.com
text:
This problem has been reported before.
Greg Lehey suggested that I resubmit.

I have a DE203 available if you need one for testing.
My work-around is to get another card, since I don't know enough to poke my hands into the code.

le0 goes OACTIVE after some time, errors like "no buffer space
available" occur. Only downing/deleting and re-configuring the interface
brings it back, for some packets though, then it hangs again. The problem 
mainly appears while acting as bootp/tftp server, after some < 100kB of data 
transfered.

Fix: 

My work-around is to get another type of card.
How-To-Repeat: boot and ping repeatedly to another address through the interface card.
